name: Lemon Sponge Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until well combined.
2. Add egg yolks and beat until smooth.
3. Gradually add flour, salt, lemon juice, and grated zest.
4. Mix in stiffly beaten egg whites to achieve a light texture.
5. Pour the batter into an unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
